about.bestPriceDesc: Get the best value for your safari adventure with our competitive pricing and quality service.
about.flexibleDesc: Travel on your terms with flexible dates and customizable itineraries that fit your schedule.
about.sustainabilityDesc: We're committed to responsible tourism that protects wildlife and supports local communities.
about.ourStoryDesc1: From humble beginnings to leading safaris across Africa, our team is passionate about crafting journeys that celebrate wildlife, culture, and the spirit of adventure. Our mission: to make every safari personal, safe, and extraordinary for every guest.
about.ourStoryDesc2: Whether you're traveling solo, as a family, or with friends, our tailored itineraries and local expertise guarantee an experience you'll never forget.

reviews.title: Love Stories From Our Travellers
reviews.subtitle: Every journey is personal. Here's what our guests carry home.

reviews.name: Alessandro Bianchi
reviews.text: Our guide Sule took us to the most incredible spots along the Watamu coast. The beaches were breathtaking and the sunsets are something we'll talk about forever.

reviews.name: Giulia Rossi
reviews.text: Traveling solo through Amboseli, our tour guide Sule made sure I never missed a single moment. I felt completely safe and so close to the wildlife — truly life-changing.

reviews.name: Lorenzo Romano
reviews.text: Our honeymoon in the Masai Mara was beyond anything we imagined. Sule knew exactly when and where to be for every breathtaking sighting. Pure magic.

reviews.name: Chiara Conti
reviews.text: Our tour guide Sule knew all the best hidden gem spots in Watamu — we got to truly explore the Kenyan coast and then headed to Tsavo where we saw all the Big 5. Absolutely unreal.

reviews.name: Sofia Moretti
reviews.text: Our tour guide Sule was the best. We got to see so many animals up so close in the Maasai Mara — I've never felt so safe in my life. Would 100% recommend.

reviews.name: Federica De Luca
reviews.text: Sasa Safaris turned our dream of seeing the Great Migration into the most extraordinary week of our lives. Every single detail was perfect.

contact.title: ♡Book Your Safari Experience♡
contact.description: Let us know where you'd love to tour in Kenya, your budget, travel dates, number of travelers, preferred activities, or any special requests. The more details you provide, the better we can customize your safari experience!
contact.messagePlaceholder: Where in Kenya would you like to tour? What's your budget, preferred dates, number of travelers, special interests, etc.?

contactHours.description: Our team is available 24/7 to answer any queries. Contact us through the options below. Typical response time: 10–30 minutes.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.subheadline: We are bringing world-class safari experiences to Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, and beyond. Something extraordinary is on the horizon — stay tuned.

ecoReminder.ctaAriaLabel: Contact us to learn about our conservation efforts
ecoReminder.title: We Are Guardians of This Earth
ecoReminder.lead: The ocean breathes. The savanna stretches. The forest hums with life. Every landscape we share with you holds a quiet promise — to tread gently, to see deeply, and to leave each place better than we found it.
ecoReminder.close: Travel with us, and travel with intention. The earth gives us wonder — let us give it back the respect it deserves.
ecoReminder.pledgePrompt: Before you set off - make us a promise to take care of the environment on your safari?
ecoReminder.pledgeThanks: Thank you for your pledge! We look forward to making your safari unforgettable. See you soon!!!

pledge.earth: We are committed to protecting this planet and all its ecosystems — on land, in the air, and beneath the water. Every decision we make honours that responsibility.
pledge.marine: Please never remove aquatic animals from their natural habitat — no starfish from the shallows, no fish from the reef. They belong to the water.
pledge.cleanup: We organise regular beach and trail clean-ups and welcome all who wish to join us in keeping our environments pristine.
pledge.donate: We host donation forums and partner with conservation initiatives worldwide — because protecting our natural world is everyone's cause.
pledge.footprint: We actively discourage any behaviour that may harm the natural environment, on land or in the water.
pledge.wildlife: Wild things thrive when left wild. Observe, appreciate, and leave only your wonder behind.

mara-tsavo.title: Mara & Tsavo Wildlife Safari
mara-tsavo.description: Experience the iconic Big 5 across two legendary parks. Witness lions, elephants, and cheetahs in their natural habitat, with expert-guided game drives and evening sundowners.

amboseli-chyulu.title: Amboseli & Chyulu Explorer
amboseli-chyulu.description: Marvel at Amboseli's majestic elephants against Mount Kilimanjaro's backdrop and explore the hidden trails of Chyulu Hills for a serene wildlife adventure.

family-safari-beach.title: Family Safari & Beach Holiday
family-safari-beach.description: A perfect family mix of safari excitement and beach relaxation. Enjoy safe guided game drives, sandcastle building on Diani Beach, and fun-filled coastal activities for all ages.

romantic-safari.title: Romantic Safari & Honeymoon Escape
romantic-safari.description: Indulge in a couple's dream getaway with private safari lodges, candlelit dinners under the stars, and tranquil beachside sunsets for an unforgettable romantic experience.

coastal-adventure.title: Kenyan Coastal Adventure
coastal-adventure.description: Discover Kenya's stunning coastline with sun-soaked beaches, snorkeling adventures, and cultural explorations from Watamu to Diani. A perfect blend of adventure and relaxation.

whyChooseUs.headline: Born In Africa. Built For You.
whyChooseUs.card1Desc: Born here — trained by Africa itself.
whyChooseUs.card4Desc: We handle everything. You just show up.
whyChooseUs.humanMomentOverlay: This could be your view tomorrow.

pressQuotes.text: Kenya's Maasai Mara remains the benchmark against which all other wildlife experiences are measured.
A first safari in Kenya is one of those rare travel experiences that reorders your entire perspective on the natural world.
Watamu is one of the most unspoiled stretches of Kenya's coast — a destination that genuinely surprises first-time visitors.

tripAdvisorReviews.text: I booked through Sasa Safaris for the first time and it exceeded every expectation. The guides were extraordinary — knowledgeable, passionate, and brilliant at finding wildlife. Saw lions, cheetah, elephant, and a leopard in two days.
tripAdvisorReviews.author: Catherine W.

tripAdvisorReviews.text: From the moment we landed, everything was taken care of. The itinerary was perfectly balanced — not rushed, not boring. The Watamu mangrove canoe was a highlight I still talk about months later.
tripAdvisorReviews.author: Marco B.

faq.title: Your Safari Questions, Answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you're quietly wondering — answered honestly, so you can plan with confidence.
faq.a1: Yes — and safer than most people expect. You'll always be guided by experienced professionals who understand the environment deeply. Your job is simply to enjoy the experience while we handle the rest.
faq.q2: When is the best time to go?
faq.a2: There's no single 'perfect' time — just different experiences. The dry season is great for wildlife viewing, while the green season offers fewer crowds and stunning landscapes.
faq.q3: How much does a safari usually cost?
faq.a3: It really depends on your preferences — where you go, how long you stay, and the level of comfort you choose. That's why we tailor everything to fit your budget and style.
faq.a4: Think light, neutral, and comfortable. We'll guide you with a full packing list, but essentials include breathable clothing, sunscreen, and a good camera.
faq.q5: Do I need to plan everything myself?
faq.a5: Not at all. That's where we come in. We design your entire journey based on your preferences — you just tell us what you're looking for.
faq.a6: While nature is never guaranteed, our guides know exactly where and when to go. Your chances of seeing incredible wildlife are very high.
faq.q7: Can you help with flights and travel logistics?
faq.a7: We focus on crafting your safari experience, but we can guide you on flights and coordinate everything to make your journey seamless.
faq.q8: Is this suitable for solo travellers or couples?
faq.a8: Absolutely. Whether you're travelling solo, as a couple, or in a group, we design the experience to match your vibe.
faq.q9: Do your tour guides speak my language?
faq.a9: Yes — we have many tour guides fluent in a number of languages, the main ones being English and Italian. However, be sure to ask for a guide who speaks your language when booking. Watamu is a vibrant tourist community and most locals also speak German, French, and Polish, among many other languages. You're in safe hands.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Born in Africa. Built for You.
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: SASA Safaris Africa is a boutique safari company rooted in Watamu, Kenya — crafting deeply personal journeys through the continent's most breathtaking landscapes since our founding.
aboutPage.storyTitle: A Passion for Africa, Shared with the World
aboutPage.storyBody1: SASA Safaris Africa was born from a deep love of East Africa's wild places. Founded in Watamu on Kenya's coral coast, we started with a single promise: to show travellers the Africa that locals know — raw, generous, and unforgettable.
aboutPage.storyBody2: Our lead guide Sule and our small, passionate team have spent years building relationships with the communities, conservancies, and coastal operators that make each journey extraordinary. We believe the best safaris aren't sold — they're crafted, story by story, guest by guest.
aboutPage.storyBody3: From the red-dust plains of Maasai Mara to the turquoise waters off Watamu, every destination we share holds a piece of our hearts. We invite you to come and find yours.
aboutPage.destBody: We specialise in East Africa — with a particular depth of knowledge along Kenya's coast and in its legendary national parks and conservancies. Every destination in our portfolio has been scouted, walked, and loved by our own guides.
aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: Six commitments that shape every safari we create.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Our certified guides are born and raised in Africa. They know every trail, every watering hole, every story the land holds.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Every itinerary is built around you — your pace, your passions, your comfort. Your experience is our obsession.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We tread lightly. We give back. Every safari supports local communities and conservation efforts across Kenya.
aboutPage.value4Desc: No cookie-cutter packages. From honeymoon escapes to family adventures — we craft journeys as unique as you are.
aboutPage.value5Desc: Your safety is our priority. All our vehicles, routes, and partners meet the highest standards of care and reliability.
aboutPage.value6Desc: From Maasai Mara to Watamu's reefs — our roots in East Africa mean you discover places most visitors never see.
aboutPage.teamBody1: At the heart of every SASA safari is our tight-knit team of local experts. Our head guide Sule has been leading travellers through Kenya's wild places for years, building a reputation for warmth, encyclopaedic wildlife knowledge, and an uncanny ability to spot the perfect moment.
aboutPage.teamBody2: Together, our team speaks English, Italian, and Swahili — and we're fluent in the language of genuine hospitality. You're not a booking reference to us; you're a guest we're honoured to host.
aboutPage.quote: Africa has a way of getting into your soul. My goal on every safari is to make sure you feel what I feel every single time I step out into the bush — complete wonder.
aboutPage.quoteRole: Head Guide & Founder, SASA Safaris Africa
aboutPage.ctaBannerSubtitle: Tell us your dream and we'll craft the safari of a lifetime — just for you.

blogPreview.title: From the Sasa Safaris Journal
blogPreview.subtitle: Expert safari guides, cultural deep-dives, and real traveller stories — curated to make every trip better.
blogPreview.reviewText: Sasa Safaris took care of absolutely everything. We saw the Big 5 on day one. I've travelled a lot and this is the best wildlife experience I've ever had.
blogPreview.ctaNudge: Join 500+ travellers who've used our guides to plan their perfect safari.
